_comment: Flight playbook — the autopilot's CONTROL VOCABULARY (what to drive, in what order, to get a
result). These are PLATFORM control dynamics (how THIS airframe responds), legitimate to encode
per the HARD RULE (CLAUDE.md 'CRITICAL AUTONOMY STANDARD'); nothing here is this room's geometry
(distance-to-wall, ceiling altitude) which is detected LIVE by flow_contact_detector.py.
SCHEMA:
presets = a continuous drive vector held for a whole state-machine state.
recipes = an ORDERED list of steps; each step = control fields to hold + 'duration_s' (SECONDS).
A step with ONLY 'duration_s' (no fields) releases everything (neutral) for that long.
rules   = operating flags + rest_between_s: the neutral SETTLE (seconds) inserted BETWEEN composed
maneuvers (recovery = back off -> SETTLE -> rotate -> SETTLE -> decide) and explore legs.
The autopilot lays each active step's fields over the neutral 20 Hz control vector (the fields it is
allowed to drive = DroneControl.AUTONOMY_FIELDS). NOTE: io_bridge applies the autopilot's value
DIRECTLY (no manual ramp), and it does NOT decay yaw on release (yaw latches until btnCdown zeroes
it) — so a turn is one continuous yaw command until the reset, not a pulse-then-coast.
FIELDS: trigger 0.0-1.0 forward throttle (manual 'w' ramps to 1.0; 0.55 ~ moderate cruise, a
deliberate control choice — NOT measured); reverse 0.0-1.0 back throttle; joy_vertical -1 up /
+1 down (discrete); yaw -1..1 turn rate (+ = right, - = left); btnARMdown / btnCdown momentary
buttons (btnCdown = reset attitude).
DERIVATION (2026-06-29, honest re-measure — replaces fabricated values): all durations are REAL
seconds computed from the keystroke logs' mono_ts (wall-clock), NOT from frame counts. (History: the
recording is ~58 fps, so an earlier frames/30 derivation inflated everything ~1.92x; a later 'fix'
that merely divided those by ~1.92 and rounded produced fabricated numbers — both discarded.) Sources
(learn_to_fly.py re-run + direct mono_ts analysis of the keys CSVs):
arm     <- 20260627_214613_keys.csv: the one real double-press — tap 0.11 / gap 0.08 / hold 0.80.
takeoff <- 20260627_214613: actual takeoff 'e'-hold 3.25s, 0.55s coast, then 'f' arrest 0.17s.
(A manual probe found 3.0s fails / 3.1s works; the measured 3.25s sits safely above that.)
turn    <- 20260628_092608_keys.csv: 24 clean arrow->c cycles. The SPIN = yaw-press-start -> next
'c' (yaw latches until 'c'), NOT the ~0.6s key-hold. Median spin 2.016s (range 1.84-2.16,
both directions); c-hold median 0.156s. CAVEAT: the autopilot snaps yaw to 1.0 with no
ramp while the pilot ramped over ~0.33s, so it rotates slightly more per second — if 2.0s
overshoots ~90deg, trim toward ~1.85s. Open-loop; angle approximate; TUNABLE live.
back_off<- 20260628_092608: 5 deliberate continuous back-off presses, median ~0.30s of 's'. Manual
's' ramps reverse toward ~0.9 peak; constant reverse 0.7 for ~0.3s impulse-matches one
nudge. (Multi-tap back-offs reached ~0.6s of 's' / ~2x retreat; the single nudge was chosen.)
All durations are platform-dynamics medians and are TUNABLE live.
reverse_probe = a SUSTAINED reverse (experiment: does straight-back translation keep MASt3R-SLAM
TRACKING while a big turn breaks it?). reverse 0.7 like back_off; the 4.0s duration is a
deliberate tunable KNOB (NOT measured, NOT a room distance) — trim it live in the experiment.
